Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 2 0 0}{f 4 23 0 106 1 25 25}I managed to stay awake all through class today! Pretty amazing, huh?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_000_3_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 4 0 0}I kinda like days like this, when we don't have practice or anything.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 1 -1 -1 1 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 5 0 0}You know, just to spend time with the one you like...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_000_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 6 0 0}But at the same time, it's also kinda sad.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 7 0 0}After you go home, I can still feel your presence in the air...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_000_7_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 8 0 0}{f 5 13 12 5 106}You'll stay just a little longer, won't you?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I shared a special evening with Yuko.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I feel an unbreakable bond between us...[n]{f 1 1}
